calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: June Leathley. Arnold Evje, represented Plaintiff, Housing Authority of the City and County of San Francisco. John E. Stringer, Esq. specially appeared and represented Defendants, Shawn Williams and Shameka Tanner. The case settled per oral stipulation of the parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Donna Martin, Esq. of OFFICE OF GENERAL COUNSEL, S.F.H.A. 554-1245, for plaintiff and opposing party Housing Authority of the City and County of San Francisco
No appearance for the defendant. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANTs LA SHAWN WILLIAMS and Shameka Tanner's DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- Overruled, 5 Days to answer from notice of entry of order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM/301/MD) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
